# GUIDELINES

1. See common [RUST.md](./DNA/languages/RUST.md) guideline
2. When develop new REST API use [API.md](./DNA/REST/API.md), [STATUS_CODES](./DNA/REST/STATUS_CODES.md)
3. When develop new Module use [ModKit Unified System](../docs/modkit_unified_system/README.md)
4. Check [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md) for security best practices.
5. Review [DEPENDENCIES.md](./DEPENDENCIES.md) for preferred dependencies and libraries.

arguments.summary_markdown:
Changed `libs/modkit-odata/src/odata_parse.rs` so the PEG `identifier` rule keeps the required first identifier character but changes the trailing identifier-character repetition from one-or-more to zero-or-more. This makes `x` valid while preserving the same allowed first and subsequent character sets.

Kept the regression coverage in `libs/modkit-odata/src/odata_parse_tests.rs` for `parse_str("x eq 1")`, asserting it returns an equality comparison between identifier `x` and numeric value `1`.

Verification passed:
- `cargo build -p cf-modkit-odata --lib`
- `cargo test -p cf-modkit-odata --lib single_character_identifier`
- `cargo test -p cf-modkit-odata --lib`
